overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a rain-soaked neon-lit urban street at night. The player navigates past crashed vehicles and futuristic architecture including a prominent green neon pyramid, transitioning from an open plaza into a covered underpass with vibrant purple lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked street with crashed military vehicle and neon pyramid landmark

events.description: turns right to navigate around the crashed vehicle toward the red neon building

agents.ego_description: walking past a crashed armored vehicle while observing the green neon pyramid structure ahead

entered.detail: military-style vehicle overturned on the wet asphalt with emergency lights still flickering
large geometric pyramid structure illuminated with bright green neon lines against the night sky
low-rise building wrapped in horizontal red neon strips with large digital screens
concrete overpass structure spanning across the street with vehicles visible above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with a crashed armored vehicle dominating the foreground. The camera moves past the wreck toward a striking green neon pyramid structure in the distance, while a red-lit building glows on the right. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights, and the elevated highway looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza near burning vehicle wreck and skyscraper base

events.description: approaches active burning vehicle with flames illuminating the immediate area
turns around 180 degrees to head back toward the pyramid structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a burning vehicle near a tall skyscraper then turning back toward the pyramid

entered.detail: car wreck engulfed in bright orange flames with smoke rising into the night air
massive high-rise building with curved glass facade and vertical light strips

segments.scene_description: The camera advances toward a burning vehicle wreck near the base of a massive curved skyscraper with vertical lighting. After reaching the burning wreck, the camera turns around to head back, causing the red neon building to shift from the right to the left side of the frame while the green pyramid disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from open plaza to covered underpass beneath highway

events.description: enters the covered underpass beneath the elevated highway structure
ambient light shifts to purple neon glow from underpass ceiling fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking back toward the pyramid and descending into the underpass entrance

entered.detail: dark tunnel entrance beneath the highway with purple neon lighting visible inside
massive cylindrical pillars supporting the highway above

segments.scene_description: Returning toward the pyramid structure, the camera moves through the open plaza and approaches the underpass entrance. The burning vehicle and tall skyscraper recede behind as the camera enters the sheltered space beneath the highway, where the lighting shifts to artificial purple neon and massive concrete pillars line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved underpass corridor with neon ceiling installation

events.description: deeper into underpass with prominent curved ceiling grid of white and purple lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit underpass observing the curved architecture and signage

entered.detail: rows of rectangular ceiling lights following the curved concrete tunnel ceiling
vibrant purple neon light strips running along the ceiling center line
bright red neon sign with white text mounted on the underpass wall

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the covered underpass, the camera moves through a curved corridor illuminated by a dramatic grid of ceiling lights and vibrant purple neon strips. The green pyramid is visible as a distant glow at the tunnel's end, while red neon signage and concrete walls define the enclosed cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from an open, neon-lit plaza into a sheltered, purple-hued underpass. It begins by gliding past a crashed armored vehicle toward a striking green neon pyramid, with the wet pavement reflecting the glow of a red building and an overhead highway. As the camera advances toward a burning wreck at the base of a massive curved skyscraper, it suddenly pivots and heads back, shifting the red neon building to the left while the pyramid reappears ahead. The scene then moves through the open plaza and enters the sheltered space beneath the highway, where the environment shifts from open rain to an enclosed corridor lined with massive concrete pillars. Finally, the camera pushes deep into the underpass through a curved path of purple neon strips and ceiling grids, leaving the green pyramid as a distant glow at the tunnel's end.
